name: discover_media
description: Discover trending, upcoming, and popular movies and TV shows. Supports filtering by genre, network, studio, language, year, rating, and runtime.

genre.description: Genre ID to filter by (for 'movies' or 'tv' categories).

network.description: Network ID to filter by (for 'tv' category only, e.g. 213 for Netflix, 49 for HBO).

studio.description: Studio ID to filter by (for 'movies' category only, e.g. 420 for Marvel Studios).

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code to filter by (for 'movies' or 'tv' categories, e.g. 'ko', 'en').

primary_release_date_gte.description: Earliest release date for movies (ISO date, e.g. '2020-01-01').

primary_release_date_lte.description: Latest release date for movies (ISO date, e.g. '2025-12-31').

first_air_date_gte.description: Earliest first air date for TV shows (ISO date, e.g. '2020-01-01').

first_air_date_lte.description: Latest first air date for TV shows (ISO date, e.g. '2025-12-31').
